mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_BANNED_IP
${pagingTop} SELECT access_idx, access_ip, use_yn, ban_yn, remark, add_date, add_id FROM ELIB_BANNED_IP ORDER BY add_date DESC ${pagingBottom}
SELECT access_idx, access_ip, use_yn, ban_yn, remark, add_date, add_id FROM ELIB_BANNED_IP WHERE access_idx = #{access_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE ELIB_BANNED_IP SET access_ip = #{access_ip}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, ban_yn = #{ban_yn}, remark = #{remark}, mod_date = SYSDATE, mod_id = #{mod_id} WHERE access_idx = #{access_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ELIB_BANNED_IP WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND access_ip = #{access_ip}
